name: pm-skills
description: 59 product management skills for AI agents, covering the full product lifecycle from discovery through iteration. Includes the v2.15.0 Sprint Skills launch (Foundation Sprint family + Design Sprint family + tool-note-and-vote standalone, comprising the new classification:tool taxonomy implementing Knapp/Zeratsky/Kowitz canonical methodologies), the v2.12.0 OKR Skills set, the v2.11.0 Meeting Skills Family, lean canvas, persona, structured templates, real-world examples, workflows including the foundation-to-design end-to-end arc, an interactive skill builder, and lifecycle tools for validating and iterating skills. v2.15.1 ships post-tag audit remediation (docs-site homepage refresh, AGENTS.md command-table sync, sample-library README, workflow-generator bug fix, 4 new preventive CI validators). Follows the agentskills.io specification.
